rulings.Case Title: HERBERT MASSEY et al VS. RAYBESTOS-MANHATTAN, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Tax Costs Re: Deft Cleaver-Brooks, A Division Of Aqua-Chem, Inc.'S Memornadum Of Costs
rulings.Rulings: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO TAX COSTS RE CLEAVER-BROOKS GRANTED AS TO $150.00 JURY FEE. DENIED AS TO $923.00 TRANSCRIBING PROVIDED CLEAVER-BROOKS PROVIDES DECLARATION AT HEARING THAT $923.00 COSTS WERE ACTUALLY PAID BY CLEAVER-BROOKS AND NOT SHARED WITH OTHER DEFENDANTS. (NR)
